name: faq-disclosure
delta: clicking toggles 'hidden' attr on #faq-N-answer (hidden count 4->3); chevron icon rotates

name: pricing-tabs
delta: clicking Yearly sets aria-selected=true, swaps visible el-tab-panel (prices change)

name: mobile-menu
delta: opens <dialog id=mobile-menu> as modal (slide-in panel); close button command="close"
